summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of David Marquez portfolio website. All core features working perfectly including bilingual support, responsive design, smooth navigation, and interactive elements.
passed_tests: Hero section displays 'David Marquez' name and role correctly in both languages
Navigation with all 5 links working (Inicio/Home, Sobre mí/About, Servicios/Services, Proyectos/Projects, Contacto/Contact)
Language toggle (ES/EN) functioning perfectly - changes all content dynamically
About section with terminal style component and 18 tech stack items visible
Services section with exactly 6 services in responsive grid layout
Projects section with exactly 5 projects with images and GitHub links
Contact section with 3 working links (Email: davidmarsant@gmail.com, GitHub: @TottoDg14, Twitter: @TottoDg14)
Footer with DM logo and proper copyright notice
Smooth scroll navigation working between all sections
Responsive design working perfectly on mobile (390x844)
Mobile navigation menu opens/closes correctly
Hero CTA button scrolls to projects section
Project cards have hover effects and valid GitHub links
Service cards have hover effects
Navbar scroll effect working (adds 'scrolled' class on scroll)
All contact links functional (mailto, GitHub, Twitter)
Tech stack items properly tagged and visible (Java, Node.js, React, Next.js, PostgreSQL, etc.)
Scroll indicator animation present and working
Social links positioned correctly on both desktop and mobile
Dark theme with proper contrast and professional styling
Framer Motion animations working smoothly
